assessment.note: He describes broad reviews leaving him unsure what to change first — strong clarity deficit, with mild strain from not knowing where to focus.

new_queue.label: Broad reviews gap
new_queue.name: When feedback is broad, what part of your work gets missed most often?
new_queue.description: Turns his complaint about broad reviews into a concrete recurring gap in the work.

new_queue.label: Missed signal
new_queue.name: Where do you think your work most often misses the mark?
new_queue.description: Names the recurring failure mode without softening it into vague self-critique.

new_queue.label: Growth blocker
new_queue.name: What is the main thing that is slowing your growth right now?
new_queue.description: Identifies the bottleneck he experiences so the next development focus can be practical.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help you make that practice stick this month?
new_queue.description: Gets to the support or constraint that will determine whether the commitment is realistic.
